name: Sirolimus
summary: mTOR-inhibiting rapalog tracked for geroscience applications, older-adult trial activity, and rapamycin-class SASP modulation.
mechanism_summary: Primarily modulates mTOR signaling, with downstream effects on autophagy, nutrient sensing, immune tone, cellular stress handling, and SASP regulation through IL1A and MAPKAPK2-linked mechanisms.

open_questions: Whether intermittent or low-dose schedules can produce durable functional benefit in older adults
How to balance geroscience dosing against known immunosuppressive and metabolic risks
Whether local skin p16 changes after topical rapamycin predict systemic senomorphic benefit
